topic: moderate water stress and phenolic concentration
trigger_keywords: factores contribuye a una mayor concentración fenólica

steps.label: cause
steps.text: The vine experiences moderate, non-severe water stress during berry development and ripening.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Shoot growth is restrained and berries remain smaller, increasing the proportion of phenolic-rich skin relative to juice.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Phenolic concentration, including colour and tannin potential, can increase; severe stress would instead stop photosynthesis and ripening.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Phenolic concentration, including colour and tannin potential, can increase; severe stress would instead stop photosynthesis and ripening.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
